## **ER1.3.  SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **ER1.3.1. ROMATSA NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE ROMANIA EN ROUTE CHARGING ZONE IN 2025**

ROMATSA reported a net gain of +5.6 M€, as a combination of a loss of -2.4 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a gain of +5.9 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism and a gain of +2.1 M€ relating to financial incentives.

### **ER1.3.2. ROMATSA OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) FOR THE EN ROUTE ACTIVITY**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net gain from the en route activity mentioned above (+5.6 M€) and the actual RoE (+11.4 M€), amounts to +17.0 M€ (5.5% of the en route revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 18.9%, which is higher than the 12.7% planned in the PP.

### **ER1.3.3. NOTES** 

#### **ER1.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **ER1.3.3.2. NOTE 2**

**\**

# **TZ1. TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE - ROMANIA ZONE 1**
